search_purchase_placeholder: Search by purchase number or supplier
post_purchase_return_description: This will write the accounting and stock entries. Posted documents cannot be edited or deleted.
reverse_purchase_return_description: This creates a counter transaction and counter stock movement, then marks this purchase return as reversed.
no_item_warning_description: Please select at least one item with a return quantity greater than zero
no_purchase_selected: Select a posted purchase to load its returnable items
